channel.title: Forms on Pi Stack
channel.description: Recent content in Forms on Pi Stack

item.title: Best Self-Hosted Form Builders & Survey Tools 2026
item.description: Collecting data through forms and surveys is one of the most common tasks for businesses, developers, and organizations. The dominant players — Google Forms, Typeform, Jotform, and SurveyMonkey — all share the same fundamental problem: your respondents’ data lives on someone else’s servers. For privacy-conscious teams, GDPR-compliant organizations, or anyone who values data sovereignty, this is a non-starter.
